site.name: Womasulira Resource
site.defaultDescription: Zolemba za Resource Translator GitHub Action - makina omasulira makina a mafayilo a chuma kudzera pa Azure AI Translator.

header.languageDescription: Sinthani ku tsamba lomwelo m'chinenero china.
header.languageSearchPlaceholder: Fufuzani zilankhulo kapena zizindikiro za malo...
header.languageNoResults: Palibe zilankhulo zomwe zimagwirizana ndi fyuluta imeneyo.

search.title: Zolemba zakusani
search.idleHelp: Pezani nkhani ndi mutu, mtundu wa fayilo, njira yosinthika, kapena maphikidwe. Gwiritsani ntchito {up} {down} kuti muyende, {enter} kuti mutsegule.
search.empty: Palibe zotsatira. Yesani mawu osiyana kwambiri.
search.error: Index yofufuzira sikupezeka mu dev. Yendetsani kumanga kupanga.

footer.npmAria: Onani Azure Translator SDK pa npm
footer.taglinePrefix: A GitHub Action kuti kumasulira mafayilo anu chuma basi, anamanga pamwamba pa boma
footer.copyAria: Koperani chidutswa chokhazikitsidwa ku clipboard yanu
